creator: feld@FreeBSD.org
text:
- Update to 4.1.3

Added scripts so users of XCP and XenServer can finally use all Xen functionality.
This includes:

* Live migration
* Suspend/resume
* Reporting of memory usage
* Reporting of network interfaces and IPs
* Memory ballooning
* Graceful Shutdown/Reboot

http://redports.org/buildarchive/20120914161905-12190/

Added file(s):
- files/xe-daemon.in
- files/xe_wrapper

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99_6 (mode: update, diff: suffix)
